summary_zh: 高效液压冲床，适用于各种金属加工场景，压力可达100吨。
summary_en: Efficient hydraulic press suitable for various metal processing scenarios, pressure up to 100 tons.
description_zh:
## 产品介绍

HC-100 液压冲床采用先进的液压系统，具有压力大、精度高、操作简便等特点。

## 应用领域

- 金属冲压
- 零件成型
- 模具压制
description_en:
## Product Introduction

HC-100 Hydraulic Press adopts advanced hydraulic system with features of high pressure, high precision and easy operation.

summary_zh: 高精度数控车床，加工直径200mm，适用于精密零件加工。
summary_en: High-precision CNC lathe with machining diameter of 200mm, suitable for precision parts processing.
description_zh:
## 产品介绍

CL-200 数控车床采用先进的数控系统，具有高精度、高效率、操作简便等特点。

## 技术特点

- 高精度主轴
- 自动换刀系统
- 全封闭防护
description_en:
## Product Introduction

CL-200 CNC Lathe adopts advanced CNC system with features of high precision, high efficiency and easy operation.

summary_zh: 高精度激光切割机，切割厚度可达20mm，适用于各种金属材料。
summary_en: High-precision laser cutting machine, cutting thickness up to 20mm, suitable for various metal materials.
description_zh:
## 产品介绍

LC-300 激光切割机采用先进的光纤激光技术，具有切割精度高、速度快、效果好等特点。
description_en:
## Product Introduction

LC-300 Laser Cutting Machine adopts advanced fiber laser technology with features of high cutting precision, fast speed and good effect.

summary_zh: 高精度标定板，适用于半导体检测和精密测量。
summary_en: High-precision calibration plate, suitable for semiconductor inspection and precision measurement.
description_zh:
## 产品介绍

BP-100 标定板采用高精度加工工艺，表面平整度达到纳米级，广泛应用于半导体行业的精密测量和校准。

## 技术特点

- 高精度表面处理
- 耐腐蚀材料
- 长期使用不变形
description_en:
## Product Introduction

BP-100 Calibration Plate adopts high-precision processing technology with nano-level surface flatness, widely used in precision measurement and calibration in semiconductor industry.

summary_zh: 精密大理石测量平台，适用于半导体设备的基础支撑和精密测量。
summary_en: Precision marble measuring platform, suitable for foundation support and precision measurement of semiconductor equipment.
description_zh:
## 产品介绍

PM-200 精密大理石平台选用优质花岗岩材料，经过精密加工和人工研磨，具有稳定性好、精度高、耐腐蚀等特点。广泛应用于半导体、精密仪器等行业。

## 技术特点

- 优质花岗岩材料
- 人工精密研磨
- 抗振动性能好
- 温度变形小
description_en:
## Product Introduction

PM-200 Precision Marble Platform selects high-quality granite material, processed by precision machining and manual grinding, with features of good stability, high precision and corrosion resistance.
